query:
SELECT id, name, productLine, matchCount, minProjectSize, 
  JSON_LENGTH(sectorTags) as sectorTagCount,
  JSON_LENGTH(applicationTags) as appTagCount,
  JSON_LENGTH(keywordTags) as kwTagCount
FROM collateralItems WHERE isActive = true;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT id, name, productLine, matchCount, minProjectSize, 
  JSON_LENGTH(sectorTags) as sectorTagCount,
  JSON_LENGTH(applicationTags) as appTagCount,
  JSON_LENGTH(keywordTags) as kwTagCount
FROM collateralItems WHERE isActive = true;
